# earned

> Pivot in progress. Product direction, copy, and branding are being redefined.

The repo previously shipped a 75 HARD habit tracker. It is being rebuilt as a school-style daily attendance / streak app — the user picks something to follow and the app helps them show up for it every day. Final product details, name treatment, color scheme, and logos are TBD.

For now, do not rely on this file as a source of product truth.

## Technology

- Web app built with Next.js (works on any browser)
- Real-time backend powered by Convex
- Authentication via Clerk
- Installable as a Progressive Web App (PWA)
